entities.description: bookrag is a system being evaluated for its qa performance  retrieval effectiveness  and query efficiency
state of the art baselines are the existing systems used for comparison in the evaluation of bookrag
qa refers to the question answering task being evaluated for performance
retrieval refers to the effectiveness of retrieving information  which is being evaluated
query efficiency is a metric being analyzed to determine the system s performance
evaluation is the comprehensive process of analyzing bookrag s performance described in the text

relations.description: bookrag is being compared against state of the art baselines to analyze its performance
bookrag is being analyzed for its complex qa performance
bookrag is being analyzed for its retrieval effectiveness
bookrag is being analyzed for its query efficiency
the evaluation is the process being conducted on bookrag
the evaluation involves comparing bookrag to state of the art baselines
